title: Kayock Repair Shop Operations Dashboard

safe_actions.title: Create Missing Standard Folders
safe_actions.description: Creates safe standard Kayock folders that are missing. It does not delete, move, or overwrite files.

safe_actions.title: Refresh Root Project Manifest
safe_actions.description: Regenerates Z:\FOXAI\manifest.json from current module and scan state. Existing manifest is backed up before overwrite.
safe_actions.reason: Available. Existing file will be backed up first.

safe_actions.title: Refresh Engineering README
safe_actions.description: Regenerates the Engineering README from the Engineering manifest. Existing README is backed up before overwrite.
safe_actions.reason: Available. Existing README will be backed up first.

safe_actions.title: Generate Optional Dependency Plan
safe_actions.description: Writes a report-only plan for optional Repair Bay tools. It does not install packages.

safe_actions.title: Move Suspicious Root Launchers
safe_actions.description: Moves suspicious root BAT/CMD files into LegacyLaunchers with safer names. No deletion.
safe_actions.reason: No suspicious root launcher filenames found.
